problem.summary: Provide a minimal task boundary for replacing rocWMMA with inline mfma after register-fragment layout and ldmatrix staging are documented.
outputs: one 16x8x16-style tile result per warp-sized group
constraints: Inline LLVM IR / AMD GCN ISA instruction and fragment layout are TODO
Must record target GFX and instruction shape
Use Composable Kernel as a reference for production-quality layouts

verification.method: Compare a single tile against a CPU FP32 reference before benchmarking.

curation.notes: This is deliberately a skeleton. Future optimized.hip edits should document register ownership before using inline LLVM IR / AMD GCN ISA.
